scenarios.description: Crunch became Physical in Gen 4 (was Special in Gen 1-3 via type-based split)
scenarios.note: Physical/Special split: Crunch is Dark (Special in Gen 1-3), became Physical in Gen 4. Source: pret/pokeplatinum src/battle/battle_script.c move category table

scenarios.description: Stealth Rock deals damage based on type effectiveness vs Rock: 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, 1/2
scenarios.note: Stealth Rock base = 1/8 * effectiveness multiplier. 4x weak → 1/2 HP. Source: pret/pokeplatinum src/battle/battle_script.c StealthRock

scenarios.description: Trick Room has -7 priority, moves last in the turn it is used
scenarios.note: Trick Room priority = -7 (ERRATA #7). Source: pret/pokeplatinum src/battle/battle_script.c move priority table

scenarios.description: Consecutive Protect/Detect: success rate drops from 100% to 50% to 25% to 12.5%
scenarios.note: Same cap as Gen 3 — stops at 1/8 (12.5%). Source: pret/pokeplatinum src/battle/battle_script.c ProtectCheck

scenarios.description: Feint was introduced in Gen 4 with +2 priority (ERRATA #7)
scenarios.note: Feint has priority +2 in Gen 4. Source: pret/pokeplatinum src/battle/battle_script.c move priority table

scenarios.description: Knock Off does NOT get 1.5x boost when target holds an item in Gen 4
scenarios.note: Knock Off damage boost (1.5x) was introduced in Gen 6 (ERRATA #25). In Gen 4 it has base power 20 with no conditional boost. Source: pret/pokeplatinum src/battle/battle_script.c KnockOff
